name: Power Shot
description: Power Shot pistols pair a long accurate barrel with Tediore's thrown-reload gimmick, giving them a blend of precision fire and disposable burst damage. Their raw shot damage can feel modest for the barrel type, but they reload extremely quickly, and the thrown reload grows much stronger if you toss the gun with rounds still in the magazine. Holding the trigger also enables burst fire for faster close-range dumping.
notes: It only appears at green rarity or higher and drops randomly from suitable loot sources.
